meta.title: American CARGO PLANES like the C-17 could save TAIWAN?
meta.description:
According to a recent series of war games carried out by a Washington DC-based think-tank, preventing the success of a Chinese invasion of Taiwan could all come down to a single American missile system: the AGM-158C Long Range Anti-Ship Missile. 

And the Air Force's Rapid Dragon program could allow a small number of cargo planes to deploy HUNDREDS of these vital weapon systems from well outside the reach of Chinese air defenses. 

Learn more about the LRASM's potential role in Taiwan's defense: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/the-missile-that-could-save-taiwan-from-a-chinese-invasion/
Learn more about Rapid Dragon: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/rapid-dragon-turning-americas-cargo-planes-in-missile-packed-arsenal-ships/

#short #shorts #c130hercules #c17 #rapiddragon #airpower #military #taiwan #usmilitary #defense
